title: Pleurothallis integrilabia
intro: Pleurothallis integrilabia is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Pleurothallis integrilabia has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues, due to its reported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Pleurothallis integrilabia include flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which are thought to contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Pleurothallis integrilabia is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
